title: Communications to Enrolled Students
description: To: All enrolled NYU Shanghai studentsFrom: Office of Student Life and Office of Undergraduate Admissions, NYU ShanghaiIt is a pleasure to welcome the inaugural NYU Shanghai Class of 2017 to the NYU family! We're thrilled to have such an accomplished and talented group of students joining us in
text:
Communications to Enrolled Students
Twitter
Facebook
Weibo
To: All enrolled NYU Shanghai studentsFrom: Office of Student Life and Office of Undergraduate Admissions, NYU Shanghai
It is a pleasure to welcome the inaugural NYU Shanghai Class of 2017 to the NYU family! We're thrilled to have such an accomplished and talented group of students joining us in Shanghai in just over three months from now.
As the May 1st deadline to enroll in the inaugural class comes and goes, we wanted to remind students of upcoming communications that you'll be receiving. Early next week, you'll receive the first of a series of emails, each timed to help you reach certain milestones leading up to orientation.
Please be sure to add us (shanghai.studentlife@nyu.edu) to your address book so that these emails don't end up in your spam folder. If you've enrolled in NYU Shanghai and do not receive the first of these emails by May 10th and we haven't gone to spam, please notify us at shanghai.studentlife@nyu.edu immediately.
Once you've received the first email and activated your NYU email, many future communications will be directed there, so get used to checking your @nyu.edu account!
Again, welcome to the NYU family and we look forward to seeing you in Shanghai soon!

text_blocks.text: To: All enrolled NYU Shanghai studentsFrom: Office of Student Life and Office of Undergraduate Admissions, NYU Shanghai

It is a pleasure to welcome the inaugural NYU Shanghai Class of 2017 to the NYU family! We're thrilled to have such an accomplished and talented group of students joining us in Shanghai in just over three months from now.

As the May 1st deadline to enroll in the inaugural class comes and goes, we wanted to remind students of upcoming communications that you'll be receiving. Early next week, you'll receive the first of a series of emails, each timed to help you reach certain milestones leading up to orientation.

Please be sure to add us (shanghai.studentlife@nyu.edu) to your address book so that these emails don't end up in your spam folder. If you've enrolled in NYU Shanghai and do not receive the first of these emails by May 10th and we haven't gone to spam, please notify us at shanghai.studentlife@nyu.edu immediately.
Once you've received the first email and activated your NYU email, many future communications will be directed there, so get used to checking your @nyu.edu account!
Again, welcome to the NYU family and we look forward to seeing you in Shanghai soon!
